        t_count[i] = t_count[i + 1] + (1 if s[i] == 'T' else 0)

    max_lct = 0

    # Insert 'L' at the beginning
    for i in range(len(s)):
        if s[i] == 'L':
            lct = count['L'] - 1  # Subtract the current 'L' used
            lct *= c_count[i + 1]

  s.each_char do |c|
    count[c] ||= 0
    count[c] += 1

  # Precompute the number of 'C's and 'T's after each position
  c_count = Array.new(s.size + 1, 0)
  t_count = Array.new(s.size + 1, 0)

  (s.size - 1).downto(0) do |i|
    c_count[i] = c_count[i + 1] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    t_count[i] = t_count[i + 1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
  end

  # Calculate the maximum number of "LCT" subsequences with one possible insertion
  max_lct = 0

  # Insert 'L' at the beginning
  s.each_index do |i|
    if s[i] == 'L'
      lct = (count['L'] - 1) # Subtract the current 'L' used
      lct *= c_count[i + 1]
      lct *= t_count[i + 1]
      max_lct = [max_lct, lct].max
    end
  end

  # Insert 'C' at the beginning
  s.each_index do |i|
    if s[i] == 'C'
      lct = count['L'] * (count['C'] - 1) # Subtract the current 'C' used
      lct *= t_count[i + 1]
      max_lct = [max_lct, lct].max
    end
  end

  # Insert 'T' at the beginning
  s.each_index do |i|
    if s[i] == 'T'
      lct = count['L'] * count['C']
      lct *= (count['T'] - 1) # Subtract the current 'T' used
      max_lct = [max_lct, lct].max
    end
  end

  # Also consider inserting a character in the middle
  s.each_index do |i|
    # Insert 'L' at position i
    lct = (count['L'] - 1) # Subtract the current 'L' used
    lct *= c_count[i + 1]
    lct *= t_count[i + 1]
    max_lct = [max_lct, lct].max

    # Insert 'C' at position i
    lct = count['L'] * (count['C'] - 1) # Subtract the current 'C' used
    lct *= t_count[i + 1]
    max_lct = [max_lct, lct].max

    # Insert 'T' at position i
    lct = count['L'] * count['C']
    lct *= (count['T'] - 1) # Subtract the current 'T' used

end
